title: Sum of Even Numbers from 2 to 10

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate use of `for` loop to calculate the **sum of even numbers** between 2 and 10. The loop starts at 2 and increases by 2 in each step to include only even values. A `sum` variable is used to keep adding each even number during the loop.

**When executed, the code will show:**

```default
Sum of even numbers from 2 to 10 is: 30
```
